campaign: MarbMarket — The First veDEX on MegaETH is Launching
mission: Explain the veDEX Model & Why MarbMarket Matters
best_content:
Most people chase the latest L1 hype. The quiet revolution happens where community control meets sustainable incentives. That's where MarbMarket changes the game on MegaETH.

Forget the usual DEX model. MarbMarket is a veDEX - where your MARB locks turn into voting power. Longer locks = more influence. Simple. But the magic happens when protocols pay bribes for your vote.

This isn't just about trading fees. It's about creating a flywheel where:
1. MARB lockers direct emissions
2. LPs get rewards
3. Protocols pay for votes
4. Incentives flow back to lockers

First veDEX on MegaETH. No presale. No VCs. Just fair launch mechanics that reward long-term holders.

x.com/Marb_market

What's your take on the ve(3,3) model? Does it solve the liquidity mining problem?
qa_comments: The ve(3,3) model looks promising for creating sustainable incentives beyond just liquidity mining. Excited to see how this plays out on MegaETH!
Interesting approach shifting from trading fees to protocol bribes as the main incentive driver. Long-term lockers finally get proper governance power.
This could be the solution many DEXs need - rewarding actual participation rather than just temporary liquidity. Curious to see how the community responds to no VC involvement.
